label: Transparent barley awn motif
workflow: Built-in imagegen chroma-key source on #ff00ff, then local chroma-key removal to transparent RGBA PNG.
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only barley awns for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete botanical subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A compact bundle of ripe barley awns still attached to several slender grain heads, with long precise bristles radiating upward and outward, straw-gold awns, pale green young stems, faint sky-blue glints along a few fine edges, and natural dry grain texture. Botanical accuracy for barley, crisp bristle edges, precise agricultural silhouette, no environment.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include the full awn tips, grain heads, and stems without cropping. Clean studio lighting that preserves natural straw and pale green color. No cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no wheat, no oats, no rice, no meadow, no field background, no vase, no hand, no props, no second subject, no text, no watermark, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light-mode design-system board
workflow: Built-in imagegen board source, resized to 3840x2160 for the catalog asset.
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Barley Awn light-mode design-system board
Input image: Use the visible transparent barley awn motif cutout as the primary visual and palette reference.
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive LIGHT MODE source board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Barley Awn" / "Barley Awn". The board must be a wide 4K-class design-system reference derived from barley awns in a grain field: long precise straw-gold bristles, pale green stems, dry husk texture, small sky-blue field-light glints, and the exacting rhythm of agricultural rows.
Critical canvas requirement: true wide landscape 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 style composition, not square, not portrait. Fill the full horizontal board with a clear grid and large readable section labels.
Resolution and legibility: large readable labels, fewer larger rows, no dense tiny token tables, no microscopic text.
Required visible section labels: Morphous Barley Awn, Barley Awn, Light Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from barley awns only: straw gold awns, pale green stems, sky blue field light, dry husk ivory, warm grain shadow, fine awn-line texture, and soil-dark depth from the grain head shadows. The board must read as barley awn, not wheat, rice, oats, bamboo, cattail, or generic enterprise UI.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Inter, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI, 圃場, 穂先, 検索, 状態. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: shadcn/tweakcn-like buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, grain-field dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, yield and moisture data table, field filter controls, empty/loading/error/success/warning states, toast, pagination, focus rings.
Token coverage: semantic roles background, foreground, card, popover, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, input, ring, chart-1 to chart-5, sidebar tokens, spacing scale, 8px radius family, low shadow scale, awn-line texture swatches.
Style/medium: premium precise agriculture operations design system, realistic product UI mockup, exact 8px grid, all cards and controls with 8px radii, pale husk paper surfaces, straw-gold primary controls, pale green active states, sky-blue focus rings, fine awn dividers, compact field-data density, subtle barley fiber texture.
Color palette: motif-derived colors only: straw gold, pale green stem, sky blue field light, husk ivory, grain shadow, muted chaff tan, dark seed-brown, deep soil umber.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no neon, no beige-only palette, no random brand names, no stock hero layout, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Barley Awn", no illegible microtext.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
workflow: Built-in imagegen board source, resized to 3840x2160 for the catalog asset.
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Barley Awn dark-mode design-system board
Input images: Use the visible transparent barley awn motif and the visible light-mode board as references for palette roles, structure, component coverage, and texture language.
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive DARK MODE design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Barley Awn" / "Barley Awn". It must feel like the same precise agriculture system translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from barley awns in a grain field.
Critical canvas requirement: true wide landscape 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 style composition, not square, not portrait. Fill the full horizontal board with a clear grid and large readable section labels.
Resolution and legibility: large readable labels, fewer larger rows, no dense tiny token tables, no microscopic text.
Required visible section labels: Morphous Barley Awn, Barley Awn, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Preserve the barley awn system language: straw-gold primary controls, pale-green active states, sky-blue focus/accent rings, fine awn-line dividers, muted chaff tan borders, husk-ivory foreground text, dark seed-brown cards, soil-umber backgrounds, subtle barley fiber texture, and an 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. It must read as barley awn, not wheat, rice, oats, bamboo, cattail, or generic dark SaaS.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Inter, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI, 圃場, 穂先, 検索, 状態. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: shadcn/tweakcn-like buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, grain-field dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, yield and moisture data table, field filter controls, empty/loading/error/success/warning states, toast, pagination, focus rings.
Token coverage: semantic roles background, foreground, card, popover, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, input, ring, chart-1 to chart-5, sidebar tokens, spacing scale, 8px radius family, low shadow scale, awn-line texture swatches.
Visual details: dark background derived from soil umber and seed brown, raised cards in dark husk-brown, husk-ivory foreground text, straw-gold and chaff tan primary controls, pale-green success/active states, sky-blue focus rings and charts, fine tan separators, subtle barley awn fiber overlays, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls.
Color palette: motif-derived colors only: straw gold, pale green stem, sky blue field light, husk ivory, grain shadow, muted chaff tan, dark seed-brown, deep soil umber.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no random brand names, no stock hero layout, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Barley Awn", no illegible microtext.
